mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-1B-R1 — Qualified Normal-Loaded Capture Retry

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
checks={'Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\pc_loaded_resource_capture_v1.py': (44200, '1dee5e6e0870a75a7a38181095849880f43acd78caf6782ea17cf932e5ddb146'), 'Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\PC_LOADED_RESOURCE_CAPTURE_CONTRACT_V1.json': (2159, 'a873d8f81ecf1ad7169bcaee6410823736981f993ce7a0e7740bd0f6a368c226'), 'Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\README_V1B1B.md': (1013, 'a240b80f1b69836b8fc959e50b1345e69da468af10219494c64c69cef2b1e158')}
for name,(size,digest) in checks.items():
 p=Path(name); data=p.read_bytes(); assert len(data)==size,(name,len(data)); assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==digest,name
compile(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\pc_loaded_resource_capture_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8"),"<v1b1b-collector>","exec")
unchanged={'Z:\\FOXAI\\core\\foxai_web.py': 'd7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952', 'Z:\\FOXAI\\ui\\main_window.py': 'a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3', 'Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py': 'a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7', 'Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py': '765983b563f8495138c9670849de5c4703f4735a0ddc9324efd6580606fc517b', 'Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py': 'e420706136b4902d82d8dbf1fecc64ae70fb8bc639106db41033545f8c196c30', 'Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\pc_foxai_baseline_v1.py': '8c3af6d6f8d5a21a03fbd5c97eabd58280718a195c65f51a2b9201ff84ec798b', 'Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\pc_resource_comparison_v1.py': '04669d22982315e902abba818c1c2c44a4f622997c9b8346cc0357cf0306fbdc'}
for name,digest in unchanged.items(): assert hashlib.sha256(Path(name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
minimal={'MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_SNAPSHOT.json': '5ca895a436b91047b095a97efaaa7de2e23ea35555c9b17664a844826db1c639', 'MINIMAL_LOAD_PROCESS_SUMMARY.json': '83b37ebcdb6b5882573f74e96f81b42296e4d6a6fc7a2f1e9a9158c8546ae76f', 'MINIMAL_LOAD_QUALIFICATION.json': 'c300ef1e519b0dc0be949d528034ad8548392e0791e544ce70e4a650f7a09026', 'MINIMAL_LOAD_CAPTURE_RECEIPT.json': '19a76bef2adf4f88ba495ed8abcf48e356b52f628de97eccabaf6a334fbd7c82'}; root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-062243-69C555_V1B1A_R2_MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_BASELINE")
for name,digest in minimal.items(): assert hashlib.sha256((root/name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
snap=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260722-140518-F13169"); manifests=sorted(snap.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json")); assert manifests
manifest=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8")); entries=manifest["entries"]
expected=["System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/PC_LOADED_RESOURCE_CAPTURE_CONTRACT_V1.json","System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/README_V1B1B.md","System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/pc_loaded_resource_capture_v1.py"]
assert len(entries)==3,len(entries)
normalized=sorted(row["relative_path"].replace("\\","/") for row in entries)
assert normalized==expected,(normalized,expected)
assert all(row["existed"] is False and row.get("sha256") is None and row.get("size") is None for row in entries)
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B1B_SUPPORT_MINIMAL_REFERENCE_AND_SNAPSHOT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1B-1B support payloads, unchanged integrations, authoritative minimal baseline, and normalized three-path snapshot

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json,subprocess
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\pc_loaded_resource_capture_v1.py")
r=subprocess.run([r"Z:/FOXAI/Runtime/Desktop/python/python.exe","-I","-B","-S",str(p),"self-test"],cwd=r"Z:\FOXAI",capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=45)
assert r.returncode==0,(r.stdout,r.stderr)
obj=json.loads(r.stdout); assert obj["status"]=="ok" and obj["output_count"]==4 and obj["qualified_fixture"] is True and obj["precondition_blocking"] is True
assert obj["process_arguments_excluded"] is True and obj["k_path_excluded"] is True
print(json.dumps(obj,sort_keys=True))
validations.name: Run isolated V1B-1B loaded-resource collector self-test
validations.stdout: {"canonical_lf_only": true, "image_generation_activity_noninvasive": true, "k_path_excluded": true, "output_count": 4, "precondition_blocking": true, "privacy_redaction": true, "process_arguments_excluded": true, "qualified_fixture": true, "required_loaded_components": ["desktop", "model", "comfyui", "webui"], "stable_ids": true, "status": "ok", "structured_profile_redaction": true}

validations.name: Capture qualified normal-loaded read-only resource evidence

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-140518-F13169_V1B1B_R1_NORMAL_LOADED_RESOURCE_BASELINE"); expected=['NORMAL_LOADED_RESOURCE_SNAPSHOT.json', 'NORMAL_LOADED_PROCESS_SUMMARY.json', 'NORMAL_LOADED_QUALIFICATION.json', 'NORMAL_LOADED_CAPTURE_RECEIPT.json']; files=sorted(p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()); assert files==sorted(expected),(files,expected)
for name in expected:
 p=out/name; data=p.read_bytes(); assert b"\r" not in data,name; obj=json.loads(data.decode("utf-8")); canon=(json.dumps(obj,indent=2,sort_keys=True,ensure_ascii=False)+"\n").encode("utf-8"); assert data==canon,name
assert sum((out/name).stat().st_size for name in expected)<8*1024*1024
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B1B_EXACT_FOUR_CANONICAL_OUTPUTS_OK")
validations.name: Validate exactly four deterministic UTF-8 LF-only evidence outputs

assert q["status"]=="qualified_normal_loaded" and q["blocker_count"]==0
req=q["required_presence_confirmed"]; assert all(req.values()),req
w=p["workload_presence"]; assert w["foxai_desktop_pythonw_present"] is True and w["comfyui_listener_8188_present"] is True and w["webui_listener_8765_present"] is True
assert w["llama_server_or_model_process_present"] is True or w["model_listener_8080_present"] is True
assert q["image_generation_activity"]["active_generation_detected"] is None and q["image_generation_activity"]["availability_status"]=="not_evaluated"

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json,hashlib
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-140518-F13169_V1B1B_R1_NORMAL_LOADED_RESOURCE_BASELINE"); r=json.loads((out/"NORMAL_LOADED_CAPTURE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert r["status"]=="captured_and_verified" and r["qualification_status"]=="qualified_normal_loaded" and r["output_count"]==4
for key in ("read_only_collection","privacy_validation_passed","deterministic_utf8_lf_serialization"):
 assert r[key] is True,key
for key in ("automatic_process_changes_performed","services_changed","startup_items_changed","registry_writes","network_connections_initiated","models_started_by_collector","comfyui_started_by_collector","gui_started_by_collector","live_foxai_modules_imported","minimal_load_evidence_modified","rollback_drive_k_accessed"):
 assert r[key] is False,key
assert len(r["outputs_before_receipt"])==3
for row in r["outputs_before_receipt"]:
 data=(out/row["name"]).read_bytes(); assert len(data)==row["size_bytes"] and hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==row["sha256"]
assert sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.iterdir())<8*1024*1024
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B1B_READ_ONLY_RECEIPT_AND_SIZE_OK")
validations.name: Validate read-only receipt, unchanged minimal evidence, and size ceiling
